blocker: Real Fireball-format corpus is only 319 trajectories (no source incidents.jsonl, no fireball-trained model slug in repo); training data-scaling curve requires data >319 + a fit callback in shared core. Harness degrades honestly (caps at 319, blocked:true, no fabricated scores/curve).
one_line: Built + tested (13/13 pass) a stratified/nested Fireball-format data-size sweep harness with closed-form power analysis (eval N/arm: 304 @ delta=0.05, sd=0.22) and synthetic-fixture validation; real corpus=319 recs so 1k/10k/50k training curve is blocked, not faked.
